articles.summary: January 31, 2026 - Unlike traditional retailers, platforms such as Blinkit, Swiggy Instamart and Zepto don't deliver from large supermarkets or distant warehouses.

articles.title: Blinkit vs Zepto: A Full Comparison of India's Quick Delivery Giants
articles.summary: By September 2024, Blinkit’s stores increased to 791 from 411 a year earlier. As of June 2024, Zepto has approximately 350 dark store locations. Both derive competition from Swiggy Instamart and BigBasket.

articles.summary: September 4, 2025 - Tracing how India’s top delivery apps started, evolved, and scaled into everyday essentials. One day I was scrolling Instagram Reels, and I saw two ads back to back one for Swiggy and one for Zepto.
